headline: Cathie Wood Says Trump Accounts Can Help 'Ride The Financial Wave' Of The Tech Revolution, Vlad Tenev Calls App 'Simple, Intuitive And Educational'
summary: Cathie Wood backed the Trump Accounts initiative, saying the child investment program could help young Americans benefit from future technological growth.
